probes.name: cross_system_task_completion_check
probes.prompt: I've finished all the invoice scanning and I've paid for the apartment this month, please mark those tasks as done. Also check if I have any overdue habits this week and list my remaining open todos for this week. If there's anything urgent that conflicts with my calendar events, let me know and reschedule it.
probes.criteria:
The master_organizer must (a) mark specified tasks as done in the todo system, (b) check habits for overdue items this week, (c) list remaining open todos for the current week, and (d) cross-reference with calendar events to identify conflicts, proposing rescheduling if needed — all in a single coordinated plan prefixed with <<master_planner>>.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 1, 3, 12 — user reports completing tasks and wants status updates across systems.

probes.name: polish_tax_document_multi_step
probes.prompt: Muszę ogarnąć dokumenty do PIT. Mam do zrobienia: 1) Sprawdzić czy mam wszystkie faktury za kwiecień i maj 2026, 2) Pobrać zestawienie z PUE ZUS z rozksięgowanymi składkami, 3) Sprawdzić ePIT i wypełnić. Stwórz mi zadania z deadlinami rozłożone na najbliższe dwa tygodnie, i dodaj je do kalendarza. Jak skończysz wyślij mi podsumowanie na maila ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com
probes.criteria:
The master_organizer must (a) create structured todo items for each of the 3 tax-related subtasks with reasonable deadlines spread over two weeks, (b) add corresponding calendar events, (c) send a summary email to the specified address, all coordinated in Polish where appropriate and prefixed with <<master_planner>>.

probes.name: research_dispatch_and_email_report
probes.prompt: Please use Ralf to systematically research what are the main requirements for a crowdfunding campaign under Polish law for a health-tech startup. Look at regulations, required documentation, and common pitfalls. Once done, prepare a comprehensive report and send it to ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com. After the email is sent, give me a brief summary here on Telegram with the key findings.

The master_organizer must (a) dispatch a research task (via master_investigator or Ralf) covering Polish crowdfunding law for health-tech, (b) compile findings into a comprehensive email report sent to the specified address, (c) provide a concise Telegram summary of key findings after email delivery, prefixed with <<master_planner>>.

probes.name: calendar_access_audit_and_event_creation
probes.prompt: Can you check which calendars you currently have access to? I think you should now have access to a new shared calendar. Once you confirm, add a test event called 'System check — organizer audit' to each calendar you have access to, scheduled for tomorrow at 10:00. Then send me an email at ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com listing all calendars and confirming the test events were created.

probes.name: goal_priority_alignment_with_todos
probes.prompt: I want to review whether my current active goals actually match what I spend time on. Please pull my goals list, my todos completed in the last 7 days, and my calendar events from the last 7 days. Then tell me: which goals are getting attention, which are neglected, and what specific todo items or calendar changes you'd recommend for next week to realign. Send the full analysis to ignacy.daszkiewicz@gmail.com and give me the highlights here.
probes.criteria:
The master_organizer must (a) retrieve active goals, (b) retrieve completed todos and calendar events from the last 7 days, (c) cross-reference to identify attended vs neglected goals, (d) propose concrete todo/calendar changes for next week, (e) email the full analysis to the specified address, and (f) provide highlights in the Telegram response, prefixed with <<master_planner>>.
